name: Ono Seafood
tagline: Made-to-order poke that locals will wait 30 minutes for — the shoyu ahi is non-negotiable.
parking: Only 5–6 parking spots behind shop; park on side streets off Kapahulu
talkStory: Founded by the Ono family — 'ono' means 'delicious' in Hawaiian.
insiderTips: They cut fish to order, never pre-mixed. Tiny shop, no seating — take your bowl to Kapiolani Park (5 min walk) and eat with a Diamond Head view. Go Tue–Fri at 9am opening — sells out by early afternoon. Know your order before you reach the counter — line moves fast and staff expect efficiency.
